Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros

Video.summary: Two epic fights take place at HK48. First, Abbas Faleh takes on Cam MacDonald in an amateur match full of action. Then, UFC hopeful Jesse Arnett defends his HK title vs. American Darrick Minner.

Video.title: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Two exciting matches take place at HK48. First, Jess Elverum steps in to the cage against Jenn Wolstenholme in a female Bantamweight bout. Then see if Cody Wilson can strip the title belt from HK champ Sergej ""Leglock"" Juskevic.

Video.summary: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski

Journey Fight Series V - Darnell Parker v. Patrick Ward

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

Video.title: M-1 Challenge 74 - Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky

Image.alt: M-1 Challenge 74 - Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky
M-1 Challenge 74 - Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky
M-1 Challenge 74 - Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
